title: Add tautulli-credentials to 1Password
description: Create a 1Password item named `tautulli-credentials` with an `api-key` field containing the Tautulli API key. This enables the Tautulli widget stats on the Homepage dashboard.

title: Add immich-credentials to 1Password
description: Create a 1Password item named `immich-credentials` with an `api-key` field containing the Immich API key. This enables the Immich widget stats on the Homepage dashboard.

title: Add homeassistant-credentials to 1Password
description: Create a 1Password item named `homeassistant-credentials` with an `api-key` field containing the Home Assistant long-lived access token. This enables the Home Assistant widget stats on the Homepage dashboard.
